contact.headline: Let's Build Something That Lasts
contact.subheadline: Tell us about your project. We usually reply within one business day.

errors.tooShort: Please give us a bit more detail

contact.success: Message sent — we'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

hero.headline: Digital Engineering Studio that endures.
hero.subheadline: We design and build precise, performant digital architecture for brands that intend to last. Beyond websites and applications—we engineer experiences.

vision.headline: Transforming Ideas into Digital Products
body: At Eprox, we believe technology should go beyond functionality. We create far more than websites, applications, and software. We build digital experiences that combine strategy, premium design, and software engineering to transform ambitious ideas into high-impact digital products.

Every project is designed with performance, innovation, and user experience at its core. Our goal is to create solutions that not only look exceptional but also deliver real business results, strengthen brands, and accelerate our clients' growth.

foundation.headline: Where It All Began
body: Eprox was founded on the belief that exceptional digital products require far more than great design or well-written code. They demand the seamless integration of strategy, engineering, and user experience.

Founded by Elis Pethke, Eprox was created to bridge the strength of software engineering with the sophistication of digital design. Every project is crafted with meticulous attention to detail, a focus on performance, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Today, we partner with companies looking for more than an online presence. We create digital products that combine technology, design, and strategy to deliver lasting value and measurable results.

meta.title: Eprox Studio — Digital Engineering Studio
meta.description: We design and build precise, performant digital architecture for brands that intend to last. Beyond websites and applications — we engineer experiences.
meta.workDescription: A growing collection of digital products engineered for performance, precision, and lasting impact.

notFound.headline: This page doesn't exist.
notFound.body: The address may have changed, or it never existed. Let's take you back to solid ground.

errorPage.headline: Something went off-script.
errorPage.body: Our side, not yours. The team has been notified — please try again.

sections.heading: What we collect
sections.body: When you use our contact form or subscribe to the newsletter, we collect the information you provide: your name, email address, subject and message. Browsing the site itself requires no account and no personal data.

sections.heading: How we use it
sections.body: Submitted information is used exclusively to respond to your inquiry or deliver the newsletter you requested. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We use one essential first-party cookie to remember your privacy choice for 180 days. Analytics cookies are only set if you explicitly accept them in the consent dialog, and you can change your mind at any time by clearing your cookies.

sections.heading: Data processors
sections.body: Form submissions are relayed through Formspree, our form processing provider, acting as a data processor on our behalf. Their handling of your data is governed by their own privacy policy.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by writing to contact@eproxstudio.com. We respond to all requests within 30 days.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By accessing this website you agree to these terms. If you do not agree with any part of them, please discontinue use of the site.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content on this site — including design, text, graphics, logos, imagery and code — is the property of Eprox Studio or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. It may not be reproduced without prior written permission.

sections.heading: Use of the site
sections.body: You agree to use this site only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, or restrict the use of, any other visitor.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: This site is provided "as is". While we work hard to keep information accurate and the site available, Eprox Studio accepts no liability for indirect damages arising from its use or temporary unavailability.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Questions about these terms can be sent to contact@eproxstudio.com. We may update these terms occasionally; the date above reflects the latest revision.

consent.title: Your privacy matters
consent.body: We use essential cookies to make this site work and to remember your preferences. With your permission, we may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with the site. Your choice is stored for 180 days.
